name: Deutsches Beefsteak (German Beefsteaks)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, soak the roll in water.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a frying pan. Cook the chopped onion until lightly browned.
3. Transfer the onion to a bowl and squeeze the roll as dry as possible. Mix the roll with the onion.
4. Add the ground beef; blend well. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Shape the meat into 4 patties. Cook about 5 minutes on each side or until desired doneness is reached. Remove and keep warm.
6. Add sliced onions to the pan drippings. Cook until lightly browned.
7. Arrange the beefsteaks on a platter and top with onion rings.
